items.claim: Michel has diminished physical capabilities and is nearing the end of his career.
Manuel Torres has a high finishing rate, with 19 of his 20 fights ending in the first round.
items.quote: he's got 20 fights. 19 of those have finished under one and a half rounds. 19 of those have finished in the very first round.

items.claim: Ignacio Bahamondes was able to finish Manuel Torres twice.
items.quote: Bahamondes sparked Manuel Torres twice there.

items.claim: Rafael Fiziev has the capability to knock out Manuel Torres early in the fight.
items.quote: It's not like Fiziev can't go out there and knock out Torres early.
